request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure makes us vulnerable to cyberattacks? While some argue for open markets, the reality is that strategic autonomy in defense tech is our best deterrent. Look at how [Allied Nation] secured its 5G networks - they're now leading in both security and innovation. It's time we prioritize our own capabilities over short-term cost savings. #NationalSecurityFirst #TechIndependence
